name: Can I sue my boss if chemicals at work made me sick in Boise Idaho?
description: File Idaho workers' comp claim; no direct suit against employer, but possible vs. chemical manufacturers[2].

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my boss if chemicals at work made me sick in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: File Idaho workers' comp claim; no direct suit against employer, but possible vs. chemical manufacturers[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, in Idaho you can't sue your employer directly; file a workers' compensation claim instead.** Workers' comp is the exclusive remedy for on-the-job injuries like chemical exposure, covering medical costs and lost wages without proving fault[2][6]. Employers must follow OSHA for safety gear and training, but violations lead to comp claims, not lawsuits[1][5]. **Key factors:** Third-party suits possible against chemical makers if their product failed warnings[2]; retaliation for reporting is illegal[1]. **Practical guidance:** Report exposure immediately, get medical records linking to work, and file claim within Idaho's timelines. Hire a local attorney to check for third-party liability. **Comp benefits protect you but may limit suing employer.**
